Beau is Afraid (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,176,562Details
International Box Office $2,994,150
Worldwide Box Office $11,170,712
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $520,610
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $584,571
Total $1,105,181
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A paranoid man embarks on an epic odyssey to get home to his mother.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$320,396 (3.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/2,125 max. theaters, 2.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,938,916

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 14th, 2023 (Limited) by A24
April 21st, 2023 (Expands Wide) by A24
International Releases: April 20th, 2023 (Limited), released as Beau tem medo (Brazil)
April 20th, 2023 (Limited) (Mexico)
April 20th, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
April 20th, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
April 20th, 2023 (Limited), released as On se bojí (Czech Republic)
Video Release: June 13th, 2023 by A24
MPA Rating: R for strong violent content, sexual content, graphic nudity, drug use and language.
(Rating bulletin 2765 (cert #54220), 1/11/2023)
Running Time: 179 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: Adult Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent, Dysfunctional Family, Entrepreneur, Non-Chronological
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Square Peg, A24, Access Entertainment, IPR.VC
Production Countries: Canada, United States
Languages: English
